page.title: Subjunctive and Formal Structures
page.subtitle_html: Subjunctive and Formal Structures - C1 mandative subjunctive, formal recommendations, and fixed high-register patterns.
page.subtitle_text: C1 mandative subjunctive, formal recommendations, and fixed high-register patterns.

blocks.body: {"level":"C1","intro":"Subjunctive and Formal Structures: compact anchors for formal recommendations, requirements, and fixed high-register patterns.","rules":[{"label":"Mandative subjunctive","text":"After adjectives and verbs of importance, use the base verb in formal English.","example":"It is essential that every applicant submit the form."},{"label":"Formal alternatives","text":"Use should + infinitive or passive structures when the register allows them.","example":"The committee recommended that the policy should be revised."},{"label":"Fixed formal patterns","text":"Use phrases such as lest, be that as it may, and suffice it to say in controlled formal contexts.","example":"The rule was changed lest further confusion arise."}]}

blocks.heading: C1 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the Polyglot English C1 subjunctive and formal structures lesson package.
